title: Pungent Crisp Vietnamese Papelon Mi Quang
description: A kid-friendly Vietnamese dish featuring papelon, mortar-pestle-pound, and whole30-friendly ingredients, served in a banana leaf vessel.
instructions: Pound the papelon in a mortar and pestle until it is well crushed.
Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Grill the chicken breast until it is cooked through and slice it into thin strips.
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat and add the minced garlic.
Add the fish sauce and lime juice to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles and chicken to the pan and stir to combine.
Spoon the mixture onto a banana leaf and top with crushed papelon.
Fold the banana leaf over the filling to form a packet and serve.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 3 more packets.
